title: Verify access token expiration and refresh token rotation
description: Test the automatic and transparent refreshing of an access token using a refresh token when the access token expires.
preconditions: User is logged into the application

steps.description: 1. Log in to the application and capture the initial access and refresh tokens
2. Wait for the access token to expire (e.g., > 15 minutes)
3. Attempt to make an API call to a protected endpoint using the expired access token
4. Observe the network traffic to confirm a token refresh request is made
5. Verify the original API call succeeds after the token refresh

expected_result: The initial API call with the expired token fails, triggering a silent request to the token refresh endpoint. A new access token and a new refresh token are issued and stored. The original API call is retried with the new access token and succeeds without interrupting the user.
